title: Buttery Velvety Mediterranean Lasagna
description: A rich and creamy Mediterranean-inspired lasagna dish, perfect for a date night. The combination of buttery bechamel sauce, velvety hummus, and tender lasagna sheets will leave you wanting more.
instructions: Steam the lasagna sheets using a mushrooms steam for 4 minutes to make them soft and pliable.
In a medium saucepan, melt 20g of butter over medium heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of olive oil, then sauté 2 cloves of garlic until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add 250g of hummus and stir to combine with the garlic and butter. Cook for 2 minutes, until the mixture is well coated and slightly thickened.
Stir in 1 teaspoon of dried oregano, 1/2 teaspoon of ground cumin, and 1/2 teaspoon of paprika. Cook for an additional 1 minute, until the spices are fragrant.
Transfer the saucepan to a wire rack to cool slightly.

In a large mixing bowl, combine 400g of bechamel sauce, 3 tablespoons of chopped fresh parsley, 1/4 cup of grated Parmesan cheese, 1/4 cup of crumbled feta cheese, 1 egg, and a pinch of salt and black pepper. Mix until well combined.
Add the cooked lasagna sheets to the bechamel sauce mixture and toss to coat evenly.
Transfer the lasagna mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish and spread it out evenly.
Top with an additional 1/4 cup of grated Parmesan cheese and a sprinkle of chopped fresh parsley.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
Remove the lasagna from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
